metadata.description: glm-hammer marketplace: storyline-driven design tokens, strong planning, and hammering implementation loops

plugins.name: glm-hammer
plugins.description: Storyline-driven design tokens verified by a designer panel (crucible), recon-first strong planning (forge) verified by a 3-critic panel, plus a worker-validator-critic implementation loop (hammer) with security/QA review gates. Hooks enforce the gates so the agent cannot skip verification.
